Shadow Request to Send

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x8c
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Shadow of MCR[1] (RTS) allowing direct RTS control without read-modify-write on MCR. Only present when SHADOW is configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] srts rw 0x0 SRTS

Field Descriptions

srts - SRTS

Shadow RTS. Controls rts_n output. 0=de-asserted, 1=asserted.
